Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 263. Keeping an Eye on Harran and Halahhu (CT 53 419)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
oo beginning broken away

(Beginning destroyed)

o 1'1'

[x x x x x x x x x] KUR.a-⸢x⸣+[x x]

o 2'2'

[x x x x x x]-me : ina ŠÀ-bi : ⸢a-mar⸣

(2) [......] I will inspect the [...] there

o 3'3'

[x x x x x]-⸢ni*⸣ : a-na URU.KASKAL

(3) [...... I will g]o to Harran

o 4'4'

[x x x al-la]-ka : LÚv.ḫa-za-na-te

(4) [......] the mayors

o 5'5'

[x x x x x]+⸢x⸣ ma-šá-sa-te : i-⸢tu*-ur*⸣-[du]

(5) [......] have descended ...

o 6'6'

[x x x x] ⸢a⸣-na KUR.ḫa-làḫ-ḫi : al-la-[ka]

(6) [......] I will go to Halahhu, and

o 7'7'

[mi-i-nu] ⸢ša⸣ a-ma-ru-ú-ni

(7) [whatever] I see

o 8'8'

[mi-i-nu] ⸢ša i⸣-pa-šú-u-ni

(8) [wharever] they do

o 9'9'

[x x x x] ina IGI ⸢LUGAL⸣ : EN-ía a-qa-[bi]

(9) [......] I will tell to the king, my lord.

o 10'10'

[x x x x] ⸢UD 16⸣-KÁM A.AN i-⸢zu⸣-[nun]

(10) [......] It rained on the 16th;

o 11'11'

[x x x x] ⸢UD?⸣ [x x x]+⸢x⸣ ik-ta-[x x]

(11) [......] pour[ed ...]

o 12'12'

[x x x x x x x] ⸢KIN⸣ am-me-[ú]

(12) [......] that [...]

o 13'13'

[x x x x i]-ra-ʾa-mu-u-ni [x x]

(13) [...... who] loves [...]

o 14'14'

[x x x x]+⸢x⸣-la : a-na ⸢LUGAL⸣ [EN-ía]

(14) [......] to the king [my lord]

rest broken away

(Rest destroyed)

Reverse
rr obliterated

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P313832/.
